segments.text: Both players are completely locked in defensive posture
segments.original_text: ありましたから両者ともに待つ構えは完全に整っている

segments.text: And so this is probably the dynamics between the two
segments.original_text: そしてねこれがねあのおそらく両者との

full_text: Both players are completely locked in defensive posture And so this is probably the dynamics between the two Oh, hold on! Right here for a moment
